subject: Third time reporting the same bug - completely unacceptable
message: This is the THIRD time I'm reporting that the export feature crashes with large files. Your last two 'fixes' did nothing. I'm seriously considering canceling our enterprise contract if this isn't resolved this week. I need a real answer, not another generic response.

past_tickets.subject: Export fails on files over 50MB
past_tickets.resolution: Marked resolved after backend patch, customer did not confirm fix worked

past_tickets.subject: Export still crashing
past_tickets.resolution: Reopened, second patch deployed, customer did not confirm fix worked

product_usage_summary: High-usage enterprise account, exports large datasets weekly for board reporting, 12 team members
